title: SAIL International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: SAIL International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SAIL International Enterprises! We are hiring a Quality Control Engineer for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SAIL International Enterprises:
SAIL International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL International Enterprises!
